# This is the CMakeCache file.
# For build in directory: /home/runner/work/AnalysisG/AnalysisG/build_scikit/CMakeFiles/CheckCUDA
# It was generated by CMake: /tmp/pip-build-env-bpiw1u18/overlay/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/cmake/data/bin/cmake
# You can edit this file to change values found and used by cmake.
# If you do not want to change any of the values, simply exit the editor.
# If you do want to change a value, simply edit, save, and exit the editor.
# The syntax for the file is as follows:
# KEY:TYPE=VALUE
# KEY is the name of a variable in the cache.
# TYPE is a hint to GUIs for the type of VALUE, DO NOT EDIT TYPE!.
# VALUE is the current value for the KEY.

########################
# EXTERNAL cache entries
########################

//CUDA compiler
CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER:FILEPATH=CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER-NOTFOUND

//Value Computed by CMake.
CMAKE_FIND_PACKAGE_REDIRECTS_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/AnalysisG/AnalysisG/build_scikit/CMakeFiles/CheckCUDA/CMakeFiles/pkgRedirects

//No help, variable specified on the command line.
CMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM:FILEPATH=/usr/local/bin/ninja

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_COMPAT_VERSION:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_DESCRIPTION:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_HOMEPAGE_URL:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME:STATIC=CheckCUDA

//Value Computed by CMake
CMAKE_PROJECT_SPDX_LICENSE:STATIC=

//Value Computed by CMake
CheckCUDA_BINARY_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/AnalysisG/AnalysisG/build_scikit/CMakeFiles/CheckCUDA

//Value Computed by CMake
CheckCUDA_IS_TOP_LEVEL:STATIC=ON

//Value Computed by CMake
CheckCUDA_SOURCE_DIR:STATIC=/home/runner/work/AnalysisG/AnalysisG/build_scikit/CMakeFiles/CheckCUDA

# INTERNAL cache entries
########################

//This is the directory where this CMakeCache.txt was created
CMAKE_CACHEFILE_DIR:INTERNAL=/home/runner/work/AnalysisG/AnalysisG/build_scikit/CMakeFiles/CheckCUDA
//Major version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MAJOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=4
//Minor version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_MINOR_VERSION:INTERNAL=2
//Patch version of cmake used to create the current loaded cache
CMAKE_CACHE_PATCH_VERSION:INTERNAL=1

CMAKE_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/tmp/pip-build-env-bpiw1u18/overlay/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/cmake/data/bin/cmake
//Path to cpack program executable.
CMAKE_CPACK_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/tmp/pip-build-env-bpiw1u18/overlay/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/cmake/data/bin/cpack
//Path to ctest program executable.
CMAKE_CTEST_COMMAND:INTERNAL=/tmp/pip-build-env-bpiw1u18/overlay/local/lib/python3.12/dist-packages/cmake/data/bin/ctest
//ADVANCED property for variable: CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER
CMAKE_CUDA_COMPILER-ADVANCED:INTERNAL=1
//Name of external makefile project generator.
CMAKE_EXTRA_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator.
CMAKE_GENERATOR:INTERNAL=Ninja
//Generator instance identifier.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_INSTANCE:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator platform.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_PLATFORM:INTERNAL=
//Name of generator toolset.
CMAKE_GENERATOR_TOOLSET:INTERNAL=

CMAKE_HOME_DIRECTORY:INTERNAL=/home/runner/work/AnalysisG/AnalysisG/build_scikit/CMakeFiles/CheckCUDA
//Name of CMakeLists files to read
CMAKE_LIST_FILE_NAME:INTERNAL=CMakeLists.txt

CMAKE_NUMBER_OF_MAKEFILES:INTERNAL=1
//Platform information initialized
CMAKE_PLATFORM_INFO_INITIALIZED:INTERNAL=1
